mapper.sql: homepage_id, ilus_req_idx, ilus_req_code, loca_code, loca_name, sub_loca_code, TO_CHAR(str_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS str_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS end_date, TO_CHAR(str_date, 'HH24:mi') AS str_time, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'HH24:mi') AS end_time, res_msg, use_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id
mapper.select: SELECT , CASE WHEN str_date <= SYSDATE AND end_date >= SYSDATE AND use_yn = 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS date_chk FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND sub_loca_code = #{sub_loca_code} ORDER BY ilus_req_code ASC
SELECT loca_code, loca_name, sub_loca_code FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND sub_loca_code = #{sub_loca_code} group by loca_code, loca_name, sub_loca_code
SELECT sub_loca_code FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY sub_loca_code

SELECT
FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND sub_loca_code = #{sub_loca_code} ORDER BY ilus_req_code ASC
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(LISTAGG(sub_loca_code, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY sub_loca_code), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(ilus_req_idx),0)+1 FROM ILUS_REQ_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO ILUS_REQ_CONFIG USING DUAL ON (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND sub_loca_code = #{sub_loca_code} AND ilus_req_code = #{ilus_req_code}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
str_date = TO_DATE(#{str_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'),
str_date = null, end_date = null,
res_msg = #{res_msg}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{add_id} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND sub_loca_code = #{sub_loca_code} AND ilus_req_code = #{ilus_req_code} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, ilus_req_idx, ilus_req_code, loca_code, loca_name, sub_loca_code, str_date, end_date, res_msg, use_yn, add_date, add_id ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{ilus_req_idx}, #{ilus_req_code}, #{loca_code}, #{loca_name}, #{sub_loca_code},
TO_DATE(#{str_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'),
null, null,
#{res_msg}, #{use_yn}, SYSDATE, #{add_id} )
